mapper.sql: id, cus_no, cus_name, cus_manager, last_order_time, confirm_loss_time, state, loss_reason, is_valid, create_date, update_date
mapper.insert:
insert into t_customer_loss
id, cus_no, cus_name, cus_manager, last_order_time, confirm_loss_time, state, loss_reason, is_valid, create_date, update_date,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cusNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cusName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cusManager,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastOrderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{confirmLossTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lossReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isValid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

insert into t_customer_loss (cus_no, cus_name, cus_manager, last_order_time, state, is_valid, create_date, update_date) values
(#{item.cusNo}, #{item.cusName}, #{item.cusManager}, #{item.lastOrderTime}, #{item.state}, #{item.isValid}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.updateDate})
